name: output_gain_exp021
hypothesis: Phase-3 departure (## DEPARTURES): the structural diagnosis says the GDN3 retrieval signal is DROWNED by the frozen full-attention residual (frozen path produces the format, GDN3 gets vanishing retrieval gradient). Amplify the GDN3 output branch 3x relative to the frozen hidden_states residual so more of the output (and gradient) is forced through GDN3. Directly attacks the diagnosed root cause from the only editable side (can't edit the proxy). If tokacc climbs past 0.30 the signal-drowning was the issue and it's fixable from the GDN3 side; if flat/diverges, confirms the proxy itself must be edited.
